title: schedonorus ciliatus
intro: Schedonorus ciliatus, also known as timothy grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. Traditionally, timothy grass has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with timothy grass include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Timothy grass can be prepared as an herbal tea or added to herbal remedies, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
